counselling.title: Counselling Guide
counselling.subtitle: Complete information about the TNEA counselling process for engineering admissions
counselling.infoText: TNEA counselling is conducted annually by Anna University. Make sure to keep all required documents ready before the counselling dates.

about.title: About Educaption
about.subtitle: Helping Tamil Nadu students make informed decisions about their engineering education
about.aboutText: Educaption is a comprehensive platform designed to help students in Tamil Nadu navigate the complex engineering admission process. Our tools help you calculate your cutoff marks, explore available courses and colleges, and prepare for the counselling process.
about.missionText: We are committed to making engineering education accessible and transparent for all students:
about.mission1: Provide accurate cutoff calculations based on official formulas
about.mission2: Offer comprehensive information about courses and colleges
about.mission3: Guide students through the counselling process step by step
about.mission4: Support both English and Tamil speaking students
about.contactText: Have questions or feedback? We would love to hear from you.
